Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class InitiallyClauseImpl

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.InitiallyClauseImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
InitiallyClause, SpecificationElement
public final class InitiallyClauseImpl extends Object implements InitiallyClause
Standard implementation of the InitiallyClause interface.

  • Constructor Details

    • InitiallyClauseImpl

      public InitiallyClauseImpl(String name, String displayName, KeYJavaType kjt, VisibilityModifier visibility, Term inv, LocationVariable selfVar, LabeledParserRuleContext originalSpec)
      Creates a class invariant.
      Parameters:
      name - the unique internal name of the invariant
      displayName - the displayed name of the invariant
      kjt - the KeYJavaType to which the invariant belongs
      visibility - the visibility of the invariant (null for default visibility)
      inv - the invariant formula itself
      selfVar - the variable used for the receiver object
      originalSpec -

      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
